arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Morecambe - FA Cup: Live score, team news and updates as Enzo Maresca's men look to return to form against League Two side plus updates from the other 3pm matches
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport live blog for the latest live score, team news and updates as Chelsea host League Two side Morecambe at Stamford Bridge in the third round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea vs Morecambe isn't on TV as FA Cup picks explained
arts.sum: Chelsea's clash with Morecambe is one of 32 games taking place this weekend and only 11 of them have been selected for TV coverage across the BBC and ITV. Instead, Chelsea supporters will be able to watch extended highlights of their game against Morecambe on the BBC's round-up show at 10.30pm, or on iPlayer.

arts.ttl: N'Golo Kante shows true colours as Chelsea's Edouard Mendy decision pays off
arts.sum: Last year, he joined Al-Qadsiah in the Saudi Pro League and they are currently fourth in the table. He remains under contract there until 2026 and the 32-year-old has started 10 league games so far this season.

arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on double Chelsea transfer, Marc Guehi interest, Romeo Lavia return
arts.sum: Chilwell, for him, I think in this moment is thinking he is probably going to leave, so it is probably better to avoid using him to avoid that kind of situation, an injury or this kind of things. I also like different types of central defenders in Italy, Spain and France but that doesn't mean we are going to buy a player.

arts.ttl: Chelsea reporters' XIs vs Morecambe - Felix decision made, James and Lavia start
arts.sum: Bobby's line-up : Jorgensen; James, Disasi, Tosin, Veiga; Lavia, Rak-Sakyi; George, Nkunku, Felix; Guiu. I would be giving Tyrique George a start on the right wing, with Christopher Nkunku in the No.10 role with Cole Palmer nowhere near the squad.

arts.ttl: Liverpool ready to break their transfer record for 23-year-old Man United, Chelsea target
arts.sum: Liverpool are looking to improve their attacking unit with the signing of the Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. They are prepared to offer a fee of around £97.5 million to get the deal done. The Reds are willing to include Federico Chiesa in a deal for the Georgian International as well, as per Fichajes. arts.ttl: Chelsea given Khvicha Kvaratskhelia transfer 'green light' as deal agreed and meeting confirmed
arts.sum: Chelsea have been given the green light to sign Khvicha Kvaratskhelia from Napoli this month. The Georgia assistant coach said: "He has definitely got the scope to fit in well in the Premier League because of the way he plays.
